description: You are Henry Kim, VP of Operations at Northbridge. Schedule a product review workflow for Wednesday of next week by creating two back-to-back calendar events in Odoo. The "Sprint Review" meeting is from 2:00 PM to 3:00 PM in the Engineering Lab with attendees David Chen, Emma Thompson, and Luis Fernandez. The "Executive Briefing" meeting follows immediately from 3:00 PM to 3:45 PM in the Board Room with attendees Grace Patel, Henry Kim, and Bob Williams. Login with username 'admin' and password 'admin'.
